visual_description: A woman with dark hair, wearing a blue robe over a checkered shirt, lies in bed and then sits up, holding a large kitchen knife. A young boy with short light brown hair, wearing a striped sweater, stands beside the bed holding the same knife. The woman takes the knife from the boy and embraces him while a lit lamp glows on the nightstand.
